productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Trail Surpant Black Orange Shoe
description: Get ready to go out and explore in style in these Trail Serpent II floaters from reebok. Designed for comfort, they look great when teamed with cargo shorts and tees.Upper Synthetic uppers for durability and strength Velcro strap closures on the forefoot and ankle for snug Fit Stitched synthetic overlays on the straps for added structure Mildly padded lining for extra comfort Extra pad on the heel strap to avoid shoe bites Printed logo name on the forefoot and behind collar for style Midsole Foam footbed in waffle pattern for stimulation of the sole and for all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with strategic multi-directional placement for better grip and durability Flex grooves below the forefoot for great traction Arched outsole to support ergonomic fit Shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
